title: CustomWallpaper
description: this mod completely gives YOU access to add your custom wallpaper in Minecraft title Screen, Singleplayer, Multiplayer or even in Settings
body:
# 🎨 Custom Wallpaper Mod — Personalize Your Minecraft Experience

Transform your Minecraft menu into something truly yours.
Replace boring default backgrounds with stunning custom wallpapers in high quality — from simple aesthetics to full 4K visuals.

## ⚙️ Requirements

- fabric API 1.21.11
- [download fabric API  <--- here 👈](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

- Minecraft Version: 1.21.11
- Loader: Fabric and update fabric loader to latest version


## ✨ Features
_🖼️ Full Custom Background Support_

Set your own wallpapers for Minecraft's main menu
Supports:
- PNG
- JPG
- JPEG

**High Resolution Ready**

## Compatible with:

- 720p
- 1080p (Full HD)
- 1440p
- 2160p (4K)

## ⚡ Lightweight & Optimized
Smooth performance
Minimal resource usage
Fast loading
🎮 Personalized Experience

### Perfect for:

Custom modpacks
Themed setups
Aesthetic launch screens
Personal branding

# 📂 How To Use

Step 1:

Install the mod normally in your mods folder along with fabric API.

Step 2:

Launch Minecraft once to generate the config folder.

Step 3:

Open the wallpaper menu by pressing {;} SEMICOLON

![custom wapllaper menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fccdd2b12a395f62ed3a2d07ea02370cbe0df685_0.webp)

Step 4:

select your preferred image file by clicking {;} SEMICOLON

- .png
- .jpg
- .jpeg

Step 5:

**return to minecraft and click done or wait 5 second to implement wallpaper immideatly
and enjoy your custom menu background.**

# 📸 Screenshots

![Default](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f2e1202763ecf58105f22d20bf06584205f5445.webp)

![singleplayer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f58a512707d90c14a218f42de8f9a7847e7d0f2.jpeg)



# 🚀 Why Use This Mod?
Make Minecraft feel unique
Showcase your style
Perfect for creators and modpack developers
Gives your game a modern premium feel

Best visual results with 16:9 wallpapers

and best of all ITS FREE


# 🛠️ Planned Future Updates
Multiple wallpaper rotation
Animated wallpapers
UI customization
Advanced scaling options



### ❤️ Support Me 


Follow the project
Share your custom setups
# 🌟 Make Minecraft Yours.

by darshiv or dgmreal
